a:Tb3cf,<div class="specification">
<p>In an investigation to compare the elasticity of arteries and veins, rings of the same diameter (20 mm) of artery and vein tissue were cut from blood vessels obtained from a mammal.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2020.]</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Each ring was attached to a clamp. Multiple masses of 10 g were added and removed. The vertical diameter of the artery and the vein was measured, both with the mass and once the mass had been removed.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">The results are shown in the table.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the independent and dependent variables in this experiment.</p>
<p>Independent: </p>
<p>Dependent: </p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State <strong>one</strong> feature of the rings that has to be kept constant apart from their initial diameter.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain the differences between the results shown for vein and artery.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:Ta35e,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. Independent: mass;</p>
<p>b. Dependent: (vertical) diameter/length;</p>
<p><em>Do not accept elasticity</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. width/section depth/slice of the ring;</p>
<p>b. same animal/age/freshness/temperature;</p>
<p><em>Don’t accept thickness or diameter</em>.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. veins have thinner walls (than arteries);</p>
<p>b. veins sustain lower (blood) pressure (than arteries);</p>
<p>c. when stretched, veins become longer (than arteries);</p>
<p>d. veins have less muscle/elastic (fibre in their) walls (than arteries);</p>
<p>e. veins have lower elasticity/recover less/remain more stretched (than arteries after weights removed);</p>
<p><em>Accept inverse for arteries in all cases</em>.</p>
<p><em>Do not accept a listing of numerical values without explanation</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/6/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","6"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"20N.3.SL.TZ0.2"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"20N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","6-2-the-blood-system"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>The experiment described an investigation to compare the elasticity of arteries and veins. In (a) the most common error was to reverse the correct responses of mass and diameter.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>In part (b) many candidates suggested that the samples should be of the same thickness.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>In part (b) many candidates suggested that the samples should be of the same thickness.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
